home.description: Native Ukrainian & Russian Tutor ✦ Poetry Translator ✦ Songwriter ✦ Poet ✦ Living in Malta ✦ Learning Spanish & German 🌻

whatIOffer.title: What's In My World
whatIOffer.subtitle: Languages are my love language — let me share them with you ✨

languageTutoring.title: Language Tutoring
languageTutoring.description: Whether you're starting from zero or polishing fluency, my 1-on-1 lessons are built around your life, your goals, and the way you actually learn best. Over 3,500 lessons and counting — and every single one is personalised.

poetryTranslation.title: Poetry Translation
poetryTranslation.description: I translate poetry between Ukrainian, Russian, and English — carrying not just the words but the rhythm, the feeling, and the soul of what was written. Because a poem that doesn't move you isn't a poem anymore.

creativeWriting.title: Creative Writing
creativeWriting.description: From brand copy to original poetry, from social media content to song lyrics — if it involves words, I'm in. I write in three languages and bring a multilingual ear to everything I create.

whoITeach.title: There's a Lesson Here For You
whoITeach.subtitle: Whether you're a complete beginner, a heritage speaker reconnecting with your roots, or polishing your skills for work or travel — my lessons adapt to you, not the other way around.

tiktok.title: Come Learn With Me on TikTok 🎵
tiktok.subtitle: I post bite-sized Ukrainian, Russian & English lessons that make learning feel like scrolling your favourite feed. Over 30+ countries already learning with me!

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Hi, I'm Alina — 500+ students, 3,500+ lessons, and still as obsessed with language as day one 💕
about.videoCaption: Hit play — I promise I'm more fun on video 😄

testimonials.subtitle: I could tell you about my perfect 5.0 rating across 3,500+ lessons — but honestly, my students say it better than I ever could.
testimonials.verificationNote: These are real, unedited reviews from italki — where Alina has maintained a perfect 5.0 rating across 3,500+ completed lessons.

booking.title: Let's Make It Official 📅
booking.subtitle: Find the option that fits your vibe — and let's start learning together!
booking.reassurance: Not sure which to pick? The Trial Lesson is the perfect no-pressure place to start. I'd love to meet you! 🌸
booking.paymentMethods: We accept card payments and cryptocurrency (Bitcoin/USDC)

step1.title: We talk about your goals
step1.description: Every first lesson starts with you. Where are you now? Where do you want to go? What do you actually enjoy?

step2.title: I build a plan around your life
step2.description: No generic textbooks. Your lessons are shaped around your schedule, your interests, and the way you learn best.

step3.title: Every lesson feels like a conversation
step3.description: Not a lecture. Not a drill session. A real, engaging hour that leaves you feeling like you actually got somewhere.

whatToExpect.title: Here's What We Can Do Together 💕

languageLessons.title: Language Lessons
languageLessons.description: One-on-one lessons in Ukrainian, Russian, or English — shaped around you, your pace, and what you actually want to achieve. No boring drills. I promise.

translation.title: Translation Services
translation.description: I take poetry seriously — which means I won't just translate the words. I'll carry the feeling, the rhythm, and the soul of what you wrote.

creativeWriting.title: Creative Writing
creativeWriting.description: Captions, articles, brand stories, poems — if it involves words, I'm genuinely in. Let's make your content feel alive.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: Building something in the language-learning space and want a real educator's perspective? Yes please — let's talk.

contact.bottomCta: So — what are we building together? 🌸

tiktok.title: Let's Learn Together on TikTok 🎵
tiktok.subtitle: I post bite-sized Ukrainian, Russian & English lessons that are genuinely fun to watch. Come join the community!
tiktok.followersInfo: I post short, genuinely useful lessons on Ukrainian, Russian & English: cultural stories, surprising comparisons, and the kind of tips you actually remember days later.
tiktok.followHint: Follow for daily language inspo, little cultural gems, and the occasional existential thought about grammar ✨

joinCommunity.title: A Growing Community of Language Lovers 🎉
joinCommunity.subtitle: Every day I post something that makes language a little less scary and a lot more fun. Come find out why so many people are hooked.

ukrainian.title: Ukrainian Lessons 🇺🇦
ukrainian.description: From hello to full sentences — Ukrainian that feels warm and approachable, with cultural gems and sneaky side-by-side comparisons to make it stick.

russian.title: Russian Made Easy 🇷🇺
russian.description: Native speaker secrets, the real slang, the idioms no textbook will teach you — Russian that sounds genuine, from someone who actually grew up speaking it.

english.title: English for Slavic Speakers 🇬🇧
english.description: Prepositions, articles, phrasal verbs — the things that drive Ukrainian and Russian speakers crazy — finally explained in a way that actually makes sense.

footer.tagline: Made with words, coffee, and a deep love of language ☕
